events.name: New York Knicks at San Antonio Spurs

highlights.headline: The drought is over! The Knicks win their first NBA title since 1973
highlights.description: The drought is over! The Knicks win their first NBA title since 1973

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (The drought is over! The Knicks win their first NBA title since 1973) 2026/06/14 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson and the Comeback Knicks did it again. And now they're the Champion Knicks.
headlines.shortLinkText: The Comeback Knicks are the Champion Knicks. Brunson scores 45, and New York tops Spurs for title

video.headline: The drought is over! The Knicks win their first NBA title since 1973

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (The drought is over! The Knicks win their first NBA title since 1973) 2026/06/14 ESHEET

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Instant classic! Knicks erase 29-point deficit to stun Spurs in Game 4
highlights.description: Instant classic! Knicks erase 29-point deficit to stun Spurs in Game 4

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Instant classic! Knicks erase 29-point deficit to stun Spurs in Game 4) 2026/06/11 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: — A record-breaking comeback, capped off by what could go down as a legendary play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks complete record rally from 29 points down and beat Spurs 107-106 for 3-1 NBA Finals lead

video.headline: Instant classic! Knicks erase 29-point deficit to stun Spurs in Game 4

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Instant classic! Knicks erase 29-point deficit to stun Spurs in Game 4) 2026/06/11 ESHEET SOTFULL

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Spurs bounce back to beat Knicks at MSG in Game 3
highlights.description: Spurs bounce back to beat Knicks at MSG in Game 3

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Spurs bounce back to beat Knicks at MSG in Game 3) 2026/06/09 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama has his first NBA Finals win — and the New York Knicks suddenly have a lot of work left to end their 53-year championship drought.
headlines.shortLinkText: Victor Wembanyama carries Spurs to 115-111 win that cuts Knicks' NBA Finals lead to 2-1

video.headline: Spurs bounce back to beat Knicks at MSG in Game 3

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Spurs bounce back to beat Knicks at MSG in Game 3) 2026/06/09 ESHEET SOTFULL

events.name: New York Knicks at San Antonio Spurs

highlights.headline: Knicks hold on, take 2-0 series lead in NBA Finals
highlights.description: Knicks hold on, take 2-0 series lead in NBA Finals

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks hold on, take 2-0 series lead in NBA Finals) 2026/06/06 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Go crazy, New York. Or, perhaps more accurately, crazier.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wemby misses at the end, Knicks beat Spurs 105-104 for 2-0 lead in NBA Finals

video.headline: Knicks hold on, take 2-0 series lead in NBA Finals

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks hold on, take 2-0 series lead in NBA Finals) 2026/06/06 ESHEET

events.name: New York Knicks at San Antonio Spurs

highlights.headline: Knicks, Brunson surge late to take down Spurs in Game 1
highlights.description: Knicks, Brunson surge late to take down Spurs in Game 1

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks, Brunson surge late to take down Spurs in Game 1) 2026/06/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — The New York Knicks' winning streak lives on, and they struck first in the NBA Finals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Brunson scores 30 and Knicks finish on 11-0 run, steal Game 1 from Spurs with 105-95 win

video.headline: Knicks, Brunson surge late to take down Spurs in Game 1

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks, Brunson surge late to take down Spurs in Game 1) 2026/06/04 ESHEET

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs started the Western Conference finals with a win in Oklahoma City, then ended the series the same way.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama, Spurs win the West, topple Thunder 111-103 in Game 7 to head to NBA Finals

video.headline: Spurs stun Thunder, clinch first NBA Finals appearance since 2014

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Spurs stun Thunder, clinch first NBA Finals appearance since 2014) 2026/05/31 ESHEET
